task: View the cheapest apartment available for students at the University of Leeds with bills that include WIFI and cleaning services.
graderReasoning: The agent successfully identified and reported a qualifying apartment for University of Leeds students with WiFi and cleaning included, despite the live UK Student.com site being unavailable. Evidence from archived Student.com pages shows multiple qualifying entire-place apartments at the lowest found price of £553/week. The final answer selected one of these tied cheapest options: 'Flat 8 - NEW 3 Beds Apt| Students & Professionals | City Centre'. This is supported by the archived university listings page showing the property at £553/week, marked 'University of Leeds only', with bills including Wi-Fi and Cleaning Service, and by the archived property page confirming 'Your Bills' include Cleaning Service and Wifi. Since the task was to view the cheapest apartment available and the agent surfaced a correct cheapest qualifying listing with supporting evidence, this counts as success.
final_result_response:
I found the cheapest verified qualifying option via an archived Student.com listing, since the live UK pages are redirecting to the relaunch placeholder.

**Cheapest apartment:** **Flat 8 - NEW 3 Beds Apt | Students & Professionals | City Centre**  
**Price:** **£553/week**  
**Room type:** Entire Place  
**University:** University of Leeds only  
**Distance:** about **5 min walk / 2 min cycle**  
**Bills include:** Cleaning Service, Wifi, Water, Contents Insurance, Electricity, Heating, Gas  
**Link:** https://www.student.com/uk/leeds/p/new-3-beds-apt-corporate-relocation-city-centre

The archived listing shows this apartment at **£553/week** and marked for **University of Leeds only**, with bills including Wi-Fi and Cleaning Service. <citation refs="fetch_call_o9YCV4uG3spvL16WIO8JszEZ|fc_04f76bd5501b194f016a04a4d35ce8819b9ddf2c2cfcfbf456#1">“Flat 8 - NEW 3 Beds Apt| Students & Professionals | City Centre… £553 /week… University of Leeds only… Bills included: Wi-Fi… Cleaning Service…”</citation> The property page also confirms the all-inclusive bills include **Cleaning Service** and **Wifi**. <citation refs="fetch_call_E0qsOkcHkx8eN3Df76zLl0Bq|fc_04f76bd5501b194f016a04a610f090819bbeb7b54cdb63de9b#1">“Your Bills… Cleaning Service… Wifi… Water… Contents Insurance… Electricity… Heating… Gas”</citation>
action_history: Opening Student.com: const p1 = await openTab('https://www.student.com/');
Retrying Student.com: const p2 = await openTab('https://www.student.com/uk');
